name: @beep/repo-checks
description: Aggregate repository-level quality gates for the beep-effect workspace

scripts.check: echo 'repo-checks: aggregate checks run through named tasks'
scripts.lint: echo 'repo-checks: aggregate lint runs through named tasks'
scripts.lint:circular: cd ../.. && bun run tooling/cli/src/bin.ts -- lint circular
scripts.lint:docgen: cd ../.. && bun run tooling/cli/src/bin.ts -- docgen check
scripts.lint:effect-governance: bun run lint:effect-imports:check && bun run lint:terse-effect && bun run lint:native-runtime && bun run lint:dual-arity && bun run lint:allowlist
scripts.lint:effect-imports:check: cd ../.. && bun run tooling/cli/src/bin.ts -- laws effect-imports --check
scripts.lint:terse-effect: cd ../.. && bun run tooling/cli/src/bin.ts -- laws terse-effect --check
scripts.lint:native-runtime: cd ../.. && bun run tooling/cli/src/bin.ts -- laws native-runtime --check
scripts.lint:dual-arity: cd ../.. && bun run tooling/cli/src/bin.ts -- laws dual-arity --check
scripts.lint:allowlist: cd ../.. && bun run tooling/cli/src/bin.ts -- laws allowlist-check
scripts.lint:effect-imports:fix: cd ../.. && bun run tooling/cli/src/bin.ts -- laws effect-imports --write
scripts.lint:tooling-tagged-errors: cd ../.. && bun run tooling/cli/src/bin.ts -- lint tooling-tagged-errors
